name: Superpriority Lien Protections

eligibility.description: Applies to purchasers of securities, motor vehicles, retail inventory, and casual sales of household goods without actual knowledge of the lien.

description: Certain purchasers and holders of security interests (e.g., retail buyers, casual sellers of goods under $1,000, and certain mechanics) are protected from federal tax liens even if a notice of lien has already been filed.
